mapper.select: /* SQL ID : SysMenuDAO.selectCd 설 명 : 시스템 메뉴의 주키 생성 */ SELECT 'MC'||LPAD(SQ_SYS_MENU.nextVal, 8, '0')
mapper.update: /* SQL ID : SysMenuDAO.updateVersion 설 명 : 설정 테이블에 메뉴의 버전 값을 증가 시킴 */ UPDATE TB_SYS_CFG SET STNG_VL = STNG_VL + 1 WHERE STNG_CTGRCD = 'CACHE' AND STNG_CD = 'MENU_VRSN'
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : SysMenuDAO.selectVersion 설 명 : 설정 테이블에서 메뉴의 버전 정보를 가져옴. */ SELECT FN_GET_CONFIG_VALUE('CACHE', 'MENU_VRSN')

/* SQL ID : CrsHomeMenuDAO.selectSysMenulist 설 명 : 권한에 대한 메뉴 리스트 조회 */ WITH CTE ( MENU_ID , MENUNM , MENU_ENNM , MENU_TTL , UP_MENU_ID , MENU_LV , MENU_SEQ , MENU_URL , MENU_PATH , VIEW_AUTH , MENU_TYCD ) AS ( SELECT A.MENU_ID , A.MENUNM , A.MENU_ENNM , A.MENU_TTL , A.UP_MENU_ID , A.MENU_LV , A.MENU_SEQ , A.MENU_URL , A.MENU_PATH , B.VIEW_AUTH , A.MENU_TYCD FROM TB_LMS_MENU A JOIN TB_LMS_AUTHRT B ON A.ORG_ID = B.ORG_ID AND A.MENU_ID = B.MENU_ID AND A.MENU_TYCD = B.MENU_TYCD AND B.USER_AUTHRT_ID = #{authGrpCd} WHERE A.ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND A.MENU_TYCD = 'ADMIN' AND A.MENU_LV = 1 UNION ALL SELECT A.MENU_ID , A.MENUNM , A.MENU_ENNM , A.MENU_TTL , A.UP_MENU_ID , A.MENU_LV , A.MENU_SEQ , A.MENU_URL , A.MENU_PATH , B.VIEW_AUTH , A.MENU_TYCD FROM TB_LMS_MENU A JOIN TB_LMS_AUTHRT B ON A.ORG_ID = B.ORG_ID AND A.MENU_ID = B.MENU_ID AND A.MENU_TYCD = B.MENU_TYCD AND B.USER_AUTHRT_ID = #{authGrpCd} INNER JOIN CTE C ON A.UP_MENU_ID = C.MENU_ID WHERE A.ORG_ID = #{orgId} ) SELECT MENU_ID , MENUNM , MENU_ENNM , MENU_TTL , UP_MENU_ID , MENU_LV , MENU_SEQ , MENU_URL , MENU_PATH , VIEW_AUTH , MENU_TYCD FROM CTE ORDER BY MENU_PATH

/* SQL ID : SysMenuDAO.selectAllOrgMenu 설 명 : 시스템 메뉴의 전체 목록 */ SELECT ORG_ID ,MENU_ID ,UP_MENU_ID ,MENU_TYCD ,MENUNM ,MENU_ENNM ,MENU_TTL ,MENU_LV ,MENU_SEQ ,MENU_URL ,MENU_PATH ,USEYN FROM TB_LMS_MENU WHERE 1=1 AND ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND USEYN = 'Y' ORDER BY MENU_TYCD, UP_MENU_ID, MENU_SEQ

/* SQL ID : SysMenuDAO.selectServiceMenuAll 설 명 : 서비스 메뉴 전체 목록 조회 */ SELECT ORG_ID , MENU_ID , MENUNM , MENU_ENNM , UP_MENU_ID , MENU_LV , MENU_SEQ , MENU_URL , MENU_PATH , MENU_TYCD , MENU_IMG_FILE_ID FROM ( SELECT 'LMSBASIC' AS ORG_ID , A.MENU_ID , A.MENUNM , A.MENU_ENNM , A.UP_MENU_ID , A.MENU_LV , A.MENU_SEQ , A.MENU_URL , A.MENU_PATH , A.MENU_TYCD , A.MENU_IMG_FILE_ID FROM TB_LMS_MENU A WHERE 1=1 AND MENU_LV = 1 AND MENU_SEQ = 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'LMSBASIC' AS ORG_ID , A.MENU_ID , A.MENUNM , A.MENU_ENNM , A.UP_MENU_ID , A.MENU_LV , A.MENU_SEQ , A.MENU_URL , A.MENU_PATH , A.MENU_TYCD , A.MENU_IMG_FILE_ID FROM TB_LMS_MENU A WHERE REG_DTTM = '20251215000000' ) A WHERE MENU_TYCD = #{authrtGrpcd} ORDER BY MENU_TYCD, MENU_LV, MENU_SEQ
/* SQL ID : SysMenuDAO.selectMainMenuAll 설 명 : 메인메뉴 전체 목록 조회 */ SELECT A.* FROM TB_LMS_MENU A WHERE 1=1 AND MENU_GBNCD IN ('MAIN','LECT') ORDER BY MENU_AUTH_TYCD, MENU_LV, MENU_SEQ
/* SQL ID : SysMenuDAO.selectMainMenuUseOrgAll 설 명 : 메인메뉴 기관 사용 전체 목록 조회 */ SELECT A.* FROM TB_LMS_MENU_USE_ORG A WHERE 1=1 AND MENU_GBNCD IN ('MAIN','LECT') ORDER BY ORG_ID, MENU_AUTH_TYCD

/* SQL ID : SysMenuDAO.selectLectMenuList 설 명 : 강의실 메뉴 목록 조회 */ SELECT A.* FROM TB_LMS_MENU A, TB_LMS_MENU_USE_SBJCT B WHERE 1=1 AND A.MENU_ID = B.MENU_ID AND B.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND B.USEYN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.MENU_AUTH_TYCD, A.MENU_LV, A.MENU_SEQ
